# Blackjack Card

## Summary
The Blackjack card is a card-based game component that allows users to play a classic game of Blackjack. It manages the game state, player and dealer actions, card drawing, and score calculations.

## Import
```javascript
import { Blackjack } from '../blackjack';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the Blackjack card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can include it like this:

```javascript
@field blackjack = contains(Blackjack);
```

This will add the Blackjack card as a field that can be displayed and interacted with.

## Template Usage
Within the template of the consuming card or field, you can render the Blackjack card like this:

```handlebars
<@fields.blackjack @model={{this.blackjack}} />
```

The `@model` argument should be bound to the `blackjack` field defined in the card or field.
